# Discussion category forms

Each YAML file here binds to a **discussion category slug** on GitHub (filename =
slug). After enabling Discussions on the repository, create these categories in
**Discussions → Categories → New category**:

| Category | Slug (filename) | Format | Emoji suggestion |
| -------- | ----------------- | ------ | ---------------- |
| Chemistry skills | `chemistry-skills` | Open-ended discussion | 🧪 |
| Model providers | `model-providers` | Question and answer | 🔌 |

GitHub does not expose a public API to create categories; add them once in the
repository settings. The forms in this folder activate automatically when the
slug matches.
